[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 001011100 4
1 100010110 4
2 001010010 3
3 010010110 4
4 000100001 2
5 111011111 8
6 110111111 8
7 101110001 5
